findings.title: Unauthenticated retrain API can be bound to non-loopback host
findings.detail: api_host is configurable via CLI/config (default 127.0.0.1). The API has no authentication; binding to 0.0.0.0 exposes unauthenticated POST /retrain/trigger (resource exhaustion via expensive full retrains) and /retrain/cancel.
findings.recommendation: Warn or require an explicit --allow-remote flag when api_host is non-loopback; optionally add a shared-token check for non-loopback binds. Non-blocking (default is loopback per NFR-0700).

findings.title: Status endpoint returns task.error verbatim
findings.detail: May leak internal exception details/paths. Loopback-only by default mitigates.
findings.recommendation: Sanitize/truncate error text in API responses.

findings.title: joblib.load on local model files (pre-existing, not in this diff)
findings.detail: joblib/pickle deserialization can execute code on tampered model files. Models dir is locally trusted; note supply-chain caveat if models are ever shared/imported.
findings.recommendation: Document trust boundary; consider checksum/signature if models are distributed.

false_positives: registry.py:25,29,32 + tests (re.compile flagged as eval/exec) - regex compilation, not code execution
tests/unit/utils/test_logging.py:127 (fake token string is a test fixture asserting PII-key absence)
